title: maytenus senegalensis subsp. europaeus
intro: Maytenus senegalensis subsp. europaeus, also known as Maytenus europaea, is a plant species within the Celastraceae family. It is a woody shrub native to the Mediterranean region, widely used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against cell damage. Maytenus senegalensis subsp. europaeus is commonly prepared as an infusion, decoction, or extract, and is used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
